title: Japanese-Style Chicken Skewers
description: Sweet and savory Japanese-inspired chicken skewers made with caramelized onions and served with a side of steamed vegetables. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
Add grated ginger to the bowl and whisk until combined.
Thread chicken drumsticks onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with the soy sauce mixture, making sure each piece of chicken is coated.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
While the skewers are cooking, heat the caramelized onions in a small saucepan over low heat.
Once the skewers are cooked through, brush with the caramelized onions and serve with steamed vegetables.
